# MongoDB Database Schema

This document describes the MongoDB collections and document structure for the Disease Prediction application.

## Database: `disease_prediction_db`

## Collections

### 1. `predictions`

Stores all disease prediction records.

#### Document Structure:
```javascript
{
  "_id": ObjectId("..."),  // Auto-generated by MongoDB
  "age": Number,
  "gender": String,
  "ethnicity": String,
  "family_history": String,
  "smoking": String,
  "alcohol": String,
  "diet_habits": String,
  "physical_activity": String,
  "pre_existing_conditions": String | null,
  "current_medications": String | null,
  "symptom_cough": String,
  "symptom_fever": String,
  "symptom_chest_pain": String,
  "symptom_fatigue": String,
  "symptom_duration": String,
  "symptom_severity": String,
  "living_area": String,
  "predicted_disease": String,
  "confidence_score": Number,
  "specialist": String,
  "disease_category": String,
  "created_at": ISODate,
  "updated_at": ISODate
}
```

#### Indexes:
```javascript
// Create indexes for better query performance
db.predictions.createIndex({ "predicted_disease": 1 });
db.predictions.createIndex({ "created_at": -1 });
db.predictions.createIndex({ "confidence_score": -1 });
db.predictions.createIndex({ "age": 1 });
db.predictions.createIndex({ "disease_category": 1 });
```

### 2. `users` (Optional - for future authentication)

Stores user account information.

#### Document Structure:
```javascript
{
  "_id": ObjectId("..."),
  "email": String,  // Unique
  "password_hash": String,
  "first_name": String,
  "last_name": String,
  "phone": String | null,
  "date_of_birth": Date | null,
  "created_at": ISODate,
  "updated_at": ISODate,
  "last_login": ISODate | null,
  "is_active": Boolean
}
```

#### Indexes:
```javascript
db.users.createIndex({ "email": 1 }, { unique: true });
db.users.createIndex({ "created_at": -1 });
```

### 3. `user_predictions` (Optional - links users to predictions)

Links user accounts to their predictions.

#### Document Structure:
```javascript
{
  "_id": ObjectId("..."),
  "user_id": ObjectId,  // Reference to users collection
  "prediction_id": ObjectId,  // Reference to predictions collection
  "created_at": ISODate
}
```

#### Indexes:
```javascript
db.user_predictions.createIndex({ "user_id": 1 });
db.user_predictions.createIndex({ "prediction_id": 1 });
db.user_predictions.createIndex({ "created_at": -1 });
```

### 4. `prediction_statistics` (Optional - for analytics)

Stores daily statistics and analytics.

#### Document Structure:
```javascript
{
  "_id": ObjectId("..."),
  "date": Date,  // Unique
  "total_predictions": Number,
  "avg_confidence": Number,
  "most_common_disease": String,
  "created_at": ISODate
}
```

#### Indexes:
```javascript
db.prediction_statistics.createIndex({ "date": 1 }, { unique: true });
```

## MongoDB Queries Examples

### Insert a Prediction
```javascript
db.predictions.insertOne({
  age: 35,
  gender: "Male",
  ethnicity: "Caucasian",
  family_history: "Yes",
  smoking: "Occasional",
  alcohol: "Social",
  diet_habits: "Balanced",
  physical_activity: "Moderate",
  pre_existing_conditions: null,
  current_medications: null,
  symptom_cough: "Yes",
  symptom_fever: "No",
  symptom_chest_pain: "No",
  symptom_fatigue: "Yes",
  symptom_duration: "1 week",
  symptom_severity: "Moderate",
  living_area: "Urban",
  predicted_disease: "Influenza",
  confidence_score: 85.5,
  specialist: "General Practitioner",
  disease_category: "Respiratory",
  created_at: new Date(),
  updated_at: new Date()
});
```

### Find Recent Predictions
```javascript
db.predictions.find()
  .sort({ created_at: -1 })
  .limit(10)
  .pretty();
```

### Find Predictions by Disease
```javascript
db.predictions.find({ predicted_disease: "Diabetes" })
  .sort({ confidence_score: -1 })
  .pretty();
```

### Find High Confidence Predictions
```javascript
db.predictions.find({ confidence_score: { $gte: 80 } })
  .sort({ confidence_score: -1 })
  .pretty();
```

### Aggregate: Disease Distribution
```javascript
db.predictions.aggregate([
  {
    $group: {
      _id: "$predicted_disease",
      count: { $sum: 1 },
      avg_confidence: { $avg: "$confidence_score" },
      min_confidence: { $min: "$confidence_score" },
      max_confidence: { $max: "$confidence_score" }
    }
  },
  { $sort: { count: -1 } }
]);
```

### Aggregate: Daily Statistics
```javascript
db.predictions.aggregate([
  {
    $group: {
      _id: { $dateToString: { format: "%Y-%m-%d", date: "$created_at" } },
      total_predictions: { $sum: 1 },
      avg_confidence: { $avg: "$confidence_score" },
      diseases: { $push: "$predicted_disease" }
    }
  },
  {
    $project: {
      date: "$_id",
      total_predictions: 1,
      avg_confidence: { $round: ["$avg_confidence", 2] },
      most_common_disease: {
        $arrayElemAt: [
          {
            $map: {
              input: { $slice: [{ $reverseArray: { $sortArray: { input: "$diseases", sortBy: 1 } } }, 1] },
              as: "d",
              in: "$$d"
            }
          },
          0
        ]
      }
    }
  },
  { $sort: { date: -1 } }
]);
```

### Find Predictions by Date Range
```javascript
db.predictions.find({
  created_at: {
    $gte: ISODate("2024-01-01"),
    $lte: ISODate("2024-12-31")
  }
}).pretty();
```

### Count Predictions by Age Group
```javascript
db.predictions.aggregate([
  {
    $bucket: {
      groupBy: "$age",
      boundaries: [0, 18, 30, 50, 65, 120],
      default: "Other",
      output: {
        count: { $sum: 1 },
        avg_confidence: { $avg: "$confidence_score" }
      }
    }
  }
]);
```

### Update a Prediction
```javascript
db.predictions.updateOne(
  { _id: ObjectId("...") },
  { 
    $set: { 
      updated_at: new Date(),
      confidence_score: 90.0
    } 
  }
);
```

### Delete Old Predictions
```javascript
db.predictions.deleteMany({
  created_at: { $lt: new Date("2023-01-01") }
});
```

## Setup Script

Run this in MongoDB shell to create indexes:

```javascript
use disease_prediction_db;

// Create indexes for predictions collection
db.predictions.createIndex({ "predicted_disease": 1 });
db.predictions.createIndex({ "created_at": -1 });
db.predictions.createIndex({ "confidence_score": -1 });
db.predictions.createIndex({ "age": 1 });
db.predictions.createIndex({ "disease_category": 1 });

// Create indexes for users collection (if using)
db.users.createIndex({ "email": 1 }, { unique: true });
db.users.createIndex({ "created_at": -1 });

// Create indexes for user_predictions collection (if using)
db.user_predictions.createIndex({ "user_id": 1 });
db.user_predictions.createIndex({ "prediction_id": 1 });

// Create indexes for prediction_statistics collection (if using)
db.prediction_statistics.createIndex({ "date": 1 }, { unique: true });
```

## MongoDB Atlas Connection

If using MongoDB Atlas (cloud), update your `.env` file:

```
MONGO_URI=mongodb+srv://username:password@cluster.mongodb.net/
DB_NAME=disease_prediction_db
```

Replace `username`, `password`, and `cluster` with your Atlas credentials.
